verses.text: Judah kumpi Hezekiah' lai-atte in a teikhiat uh Solomon' paunak dangte
Pasian in thu a ip manin a min thang a, kumpite in thu a genkhiat manin minthang uh hi
Vantung sang lua-in leisung a thuk luat mah bangin kumpipa' ngaihsutna thuk lua-in kithei zolo hi
Ngun a ek teng paikhia lehang sikseekpa in na hoihpi piangsak thei hi
Kumpipa kiang pan migilote nilkhia lehang thumanin ama ukna kip thei bek hi
Kumpipa mai-ah na om ciangin milian kineih kei in la, miliante' tutna ding munah tukha kei in
Uliante a awn dingin hua lai-ah va tusuk in, hong kicih sangin hih lai-ah hong tuto in, hong kicih ding hoihzaw hi
Thu khatpeuh na theih ciangin thukhen zum tun' pah kei in. Na vengpa in nang' khialhna hong laktel kik leh nang bang lawh nawn ding na hi hiam
Na thuneihpih na vengpa bek mah tawh thu kiseel in la, mi khat' thusim midang' tungah genthang kei in
Tua hi kei leh amah hehin nang hong maizumsak ding a, na minsiatna bei ngei nawnlo ding hi
A kilawm hunin kammal khat paukhiatna pen ngun pek tunga kham pek khat a kisuang tawh kibang hi
Hilhna a sang thei mipa-a' dingin a pil thuhilhpa pen kizepna kham bilbah tawh kibang hi
Amah a sawlte tungah a citak kamtaipa pen anlak huna tuivot tawh kibang a, a tote' lungsim thaksuak sak hi
Bangmah a piak lohpi a kisialhpihpa pen guah a zusak tuanlo meiipi leh huihpi nung tawh kibang lel hi
Lungduai-a zolzolna tawh gam ukte kizo thei a, kam nemin pauna tawh aana neite kizo thei hi
Khuaizu na nek ciangin a hoihkhop bek zah ne in. Tua hi kei leh khamlua-in na lua ding hi
Na vengte' inn-ah hawh mun lua kei in. Hong cimtakin hong mudah khading hi
A lawmte' langkhatah teci manlo a pang mi pen molhtum, namsau, ahih kei leh thal hiam tawh kibang hi
Haksat hunin a zuautat mi muan'in neihkhakna pen ha-na, ahih kei leh khebai tawh kibang hi
A dah a lungkham mipa kiangah lasakna pen khuadam laitakin puan suahkhiat tawh kibang a, meima ci-al nuh tawh kibang hi
Na galte a gil a kial leh an pia in la, a dang a tak leh tui pia in
Tua hi leh amau' maizumna dingin a bawl na hi a, Topa in nang tungah thaman hong pia ding hi
Leilu lam huih in guah a zuksak bangin gensiatna in hehna piangsak hi
Phun bek a thei zi tawh innsungah ten'khop sangin innkhumzang kiu khatah tangten' hoihzaw tham hi
A dangtak mipa in tuivot lim a sak bangin gamlapi-a om lawmte' kiang panin thuzak nuam kisa hi
Mihoih khat in mihoih lote' gamtatna a zuihkhak ciangin hawktui nin, ahih kei leh tui uih tawh kibang hi
Khuaizu a tam lua nek ding a hoihloh bangin phat ding deihluatna a hoihlo ahi hi
Ama lungsim a ki-uk zolo mipa pen dalna kulhpi a neilo khuapi tawh kibang hi.
